zh.lifeSummary: 當John de la Warre於大約1100年出生在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特時，他的父親Harding FitzEadnoth41歲，母親Livida De Meriet32歲。他於大約1130年與Mrs. John de la Warre在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1182年享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de la Warre于大约1100年出生在英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特时，他的父亲Harding FitzEadnoth41岁，母亲Livida De Meriet32岁。他于大约1130年与Mrs. John de la Warre在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1182年享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Warre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Warr
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a warrior, usually from Norman French were, werre, waire, warre (central French guerre) ‘war, battle’, and short for de la werre (de la guerre, see Delaware ), literally ‘(man) of the war’, a construction paralleled in de la Bataille (see Battle ). Occasionally it is a shortened form of Old French werreur ‘warrior’.

variants.name: Ware
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by or looked after a dam or weir on a river (from Old English wær, wer, Middle English war(e), warre, wer(e), werre ‘weir’), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Weare (Somerset), Weare Giffard (Devon), or Ware (Hertfordshire).
topographic name for someone who lived by a horse pond or fish pond, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English wayour, which became early modern English ware, wear.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When John de la Warre was born about 1100, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, his father, Harding FitzEadnoth, was 41 and his mother, Livida De Meriet, was 32. He married Mrs. John de la Warre about 1130, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1182, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de la Warre est né environ 1100, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Harding FitzEadnoth, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Livida De Meriet, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. John de la Warre environ 1130, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1182, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de la Warre um 1100 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Harding FitzEadnoth 41 und seine Mutter Livida De Meriet 32. Er hat um 1130 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. John de la Warre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1182 im Alter von 83 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Warre è nato il circa 1100 nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Harding FitzEadnoth, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Livida De Meriet, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. John de la Warre circa 1130, nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1182, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de la Warreが約1100年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトで生まれた時，父Harding FitzEadnothは41歳，母Livida De Merietは32歳であった。約1130年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトでMrs. John de la Warreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1182年に83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de la Warre(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Harding FitzEadnoth(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Livida De Meriet(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 Mrs. John de la Warre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1182년 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Warre nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Harding FitzEadnoth, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Livida De Meriet, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. John de la Warre aproximadamente 1130, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1182, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de la Warre родился около 1100 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Harding FitzEadnoth было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Livida De Meriet, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. John de la Warre около 1130 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1182 г. в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de la Warre nació aproximadamente 1100, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Harding FitzEadnoth, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Livida De Meriet, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mrs. John de la Warre aproximadamente 1130, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1182, a la edad de 83 años.
